items.name: BPC-157
items.description: Synthetic pentadecapeptide commonly referenced in tissue repair and recovery research.

items.name: TB-500
items.description: Synthetic fragment associated with thymosin beta-4 research and tissue repair pathways.

items.name: Tirzepatide
items.description: Dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist studied and used for metabolic disease and weight management.

items.name: Retatrutide
items.description: Triple GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptor agonist in clinical development for metabolic indications.

items.name: Semaglutide
items.description: GLP-1 receptor agonist used for type 2 diabetes and chronic weight management.

items.name: GHK-Cu
items.description: Naturally occurring copper peptide studied for skin, wound healing, and tissue remodeling effects.

items.name: NAD+
items.description: Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, a cellular cofactor involved in redox metabolism and energy pathways.

items.name: KPV
items.description: Alpha-MSH-derived tripeptide commonly referenced for anti-inflammatory research.
